title: Design roles dominated by digital and product design with mid-level experience
summary: Digital design accounts for 61.8% of roles, with Product/UX at 41.7%. Mid-level ICs form the largest group at 42.6%, while leadership roles are limited at 5.9%. Formal design education reported by 77.5%, with 14.19% having international exposure.
methodology: Self-reported primary field of work, career level, education background, and international experience in anonymous online survey
